postTitle: We have our very own website now!
postBodyPreview: 24d  • The Hero's Journey 🗺️We have our very own website now! I'm really happy to announce that today we built our very own website and we have two more new AMAZING acquisitions in our company, Answer 42.Here's the website, boys, check it out:https://answer42.llc/

tags.reasoning: Lea is already in the program, so this is just to keep the energy high.

reply: You're unstoppable, king! Gonna travel to Bali and Germany nexxt year next year, and then even the Himalayas for that Power-Up footage, so I am constantly traveling around for new adventures acquiring more and more lessons and wisdom. Skool and Answer 42 was 7 months ago literally, it was end of november, with so many lessons inbetween . . . and it hasn't even been a year brother and look how much you grow. . . it's exactly what you said to me one day . . . even the opposite side of your arm is too far and too big of a gap compared to where you want to be . . . it's exactly that, I feel like there are so many bigger and higher levels out there that still need to be unlocked and traversed and that's exactly why I think we've found this journey, it's what we always look for . . . whatever happens we always look for how we can spread ans share everything we discover with that collective, because there's so many lesson and shortcuts that society doesn't want us to know, because it cornflicks with their own hidden interests and this is why communities like The Answer 42 will always exist. . . I want to say I'm glad that my path to self-improvement started in this group, brother, it's not just that the community is relatively small, but it's also personal, very sincere and honest, it allows every person to be who they truly are and who they want to develop into, that's why we love it
